nasb.text: All the cities of the Gershonites according to their families were thirteen cities with their pasture lands.

esv.text: The cities of the several clans of the Gershonites were in all thirteen cities with their pasturelands.

cnv.text: 革順人按著家族所有的城共十三座，還有這些城的郊野。

ccb.text: 革顺人按宗族共分到十三座城邑及其草场。
